block.text: The book gives you the location of the City Of the Guardians, the secret base that is the headquarters Of the army Of Thalos. The map reference is 22. Make a note of this number. Substitute it for 'XX' when you are given the option to visit the City of the Guardians. You may find another use for the map reference, as well. For now, of course, you must deal with the Karosseans outside the building you are in! Turn to 368.
